steps.speaker: user
steps.text: That is nice. How was your day?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: What did you do in school?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Oh nice! Did you read a book?

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Yes, I read a small story.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: That is great. I also read a story.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I like English. What about you?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Maths is fun. Do you like numbers?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: That is good. I like writing words.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Who sits near you in class?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I share my pencil and eraser.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you bring for lunch?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I drank water from my bottle.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you do after school?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I played near my house.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you sit on a chair later?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I sat on a chair and did homework.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you open the door when you came home?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I washed my hands with soap.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Because I got a star from teacher.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: That is great! I am proud of you.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Okay. See you tomorrow at school.
